## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content updates, SEO strategies, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing well: 25 articles ready for staging, 15 more expected by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New team member Kyle Gaudreau introduced, bringing extensive growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements suggested, focusing on internal linking and site structure](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Backlink campaigns identified as an area for future development and dedicated ownership](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [25 articles completed and approved, ready for staging](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [15 additional articles expected by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New tool being developed to streamline Webflow publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Per diem pages for 50 U.S. states in progress, with special considerations for Alaska and Hawaii](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Quality and Efficiency

  - [Discussed balancing efficiency with content uniqueness for programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Exploring ways to vary intros and outros while maintaining consistent H2 headers](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Considering predefined variants for Ramp-specific content to improve quality and variance](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Estimated time for manually adding 10 posts to Webflow: 45-60 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

### Technical SEO Recommendations

  - [Importance of having important pages within two clicks of the homepage](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Utilizing HTML sitemaps to improve indexing and accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Strategic internal linking, especially in the first few paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Potential for 30-40% traffic increase through technical SEO improvements alone](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Consideration of JavaScript reduction on non-essential pages to improve load times](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Acknowledged importance but currently lacking dedicated resources](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Plans to develop a systematic approach and assign ownership in the coming year](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Shared case study showing significant ranking improvements over time with consistent backlinking efforts](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Introduction of Kyle Gaudreau, new team member with extensive growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Kyle's background includes leading growth at Humbase, an early GrowthX client](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete current business credit card content before starting new projects](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Evaluate and potentially implement the new Webflow publishing tool](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Finish per diem pages for 50 U.S. states](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Explore ways to incorporate hub topic pages higher in site structure](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Consider A/B testing for product hub page placement in navigation](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Develop more concrete plans for backlink campaigns in the upcoming year](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Continue to balance content production with technical SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qW_9MxCT8zp6T26fvNSxj8ibWAU1myWk?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
